The '''Cluster''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]] that was a regular meeting place for criminals and [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] alike. It was one of the known hangouts of the [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Vilmarh Grahrk]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Cluster served as a safe house for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="LoNH" />

{{Loc-stub}}
